text:
KINGLYMASK is a Japanese unisex clothing brand that collaborated with the Hunter × Hunter series.

Information

The first collaboration merchandise was released in July 2021, followed by a second release in July 2022, and a third release in December 2023.

Collaboration Characters

Gon Freecss (1st, 2nd and 3rd Collaboration)
Killua Zoldyck (1st, 2nd and 3rd Collaboration)
Kurapika (1st and 3rd Collaboration)
Leorio Paradinight (1st and 3rd Collaboration)
Chrollo Lucilfer (1st and 2nd Collaboration)
Hisoka Morow (1st, 2nd and 3rd Collaboration)
Illumi Zoldyck (2nd Collaboration)
Phantom Troupe (2nd Collaboration
Feitan Portor (3rd Collaboration)
Phinks Magcub (3rd Collaboration)
